text: Hello, I hope this message finds you well. I have a more intricate question regarding the application programming interface. Specifically, I’m curious about whether there exists any limitation on the number of requests we can make to the search endpoint within a given time frame. Additionally, I would appreciate any documentation or references about this matter, as it would greatly assist my team in planning our usage more effectively. Thank you for your assistance!
I can't log into my account; it keeps saying my credentials are incorrect.
I am experiencing a persistent issue where the application fails to load after entering my credentials. Please advise on any troubleshooting steps I can take to resolve this.

I would like to request a refund for my recent purchase, although I was somewhat dissatisfied with the service. However, I also received an email stating that my order was not eligible for a refund. Can you clarify this situation for me?

I'm encountering an unusual issue where the application freezes indefinitely whenever I attempt to upload a file larger than 10MB. This behavior persists despite attempting multiple uploads and trying different formats. I would appreciate any insights or solutions you might have regarding this problem.
I asked for monthly but got charged for a whole year. Can you fix it pls?

I cancelled my subscription but I was still charged. Please process a refund and confirm.
changed email, can't get the codes now.
i'm really frustrated! i thought my order was coming today but still nothing, and the tracking says delivered???

It’s really frustrating, and I would like to know why this is happening. I've tried reinstalling the app, and that didn’t help. Are you aware of these issues or maybe it’s just me?

It’s quite concerning, and I would appreciate your assistance in recovering my account as soon as possible. Thank you!
I am disappointed with the repeated delays in receiving my orders. This has occurred multiple times now, and I feel frustrated by the lack of communication on your end.

However, I cannot recall the exact details of my order, such as the order number or purchase date, which I hope will not impede this process.

I am encountering an issue where the software appears to freeze during a crucial operation, specifically when I attempt to save my work, yet I am unsure if this is due to a temporary glitch or something more significant. Is there a known issue with saving documents in this version?

Hello team, I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to inquire whether the pro plan is available for billing on a monthly basis or if it is solely billed on a yearly basis, as I have seen differing information regarding this matter.
